results.rationale: The source mentions God of War Laufey and the polished article uses 《战神：Laufey》, but this is a single article-page pending_dict guess and the active dictionary already maps Laufey to 劳菲. Keep as evidence only until a user-confirmed title or repeated usage resolves the naming.
results.refined_rule: Observe whether 「God of War Laufey」 should be treated as a work title and whether the Chinese form should use 「Laufey」 or the existing 「劳菲」 mapping.
counterexamples: data/dict.json already maps Laufey to 劳菲.
results.misuse_risk: Approving now could promote an unconfirmed title form and conflict with the existing character-name dictionary entry.

results.rationale: The English and Chinese forms point to the same game in the 2026-07-12 article, but the candidate is explicitly marked as a pending/community translation and has only one article/day of evidence. It is useful dictionary evidence but not enough for approval.
